Customer Service Representative

We are seeking a professional customer service representative for our upscale boutique. The ideal candidate should speak English without an accent and present a polished, professional appearance that aligns with our brand image.

Requirements:
- Native English speaker preferred
- Professional demeanor and appearance
- Ability to relate to our primarily Western clientele
- Cultural fit with our traditional American values

We pride ourselves on maintaining high standards. The successful candidate will represent our brand to discerning customers who expect a certain level of sophistication. Previous experience in similar high-end retail environments serving a mainstream customer base is preferred.
